entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY AND CHANGE
entities.description: The fluctuations and long-term shifts in climate patterns that affect agricultural productivity and stability

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: The complex interaction of biological, social, and economic components used for food production

entities.name: EAST AFRICA
entities.description: The specific geographic region in Africa where the agricultural impacts of climate change are being studied

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEM
entities.description: The specific combination of crops, livestock, and management practices employed by farmers in a given area

entities.name: STAKEHOLDER INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The methodology of engaging with local farmers, policymakers, and experts to inform agricultural pathways

entities.name: REPRESENTATIVE AGRICULTURAL PATHWAYS
entities.description: Conceptual scenarios used to model potential future trajectories of agricultural development

entities.name: ADAPTATION PACKAGE
entities.description: A curated set of interventions and strategies designed to reduce vulnerability to climate change

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE ADAPTATIONS
entities.description: Specific measures or adjustments made to agricultural practices to maintain productivity under changing climate conditions

entities.name: AGMIP
entities.description: The Agricultural Model Intercomparison and Improvement Project, a framework for assessing the impacts of climate change on agriculture
